ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lipids" (
  "lipid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lipid */,
  "identification" TEXT /* Identification string for the lipid */,
  "retention_time" REAL /* Retention time of the lipid in the chromatogram */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the lipid in the identification results */,
  "precursor_mass" REAL /* Precursor mass of the lipid */,
  "library_mass" REAL /* Library mass of the lipid */,
  "delta_mz" REAL /* Delta m/z value for the lipid */,
  "lipid_class" TEXT /* Lipid class */,
  "lipid_subclass" TEXT /* Lipid subclass */,
  "lipid_fa" TEXT /* Fatty acid composition of the lipid */,
  "lipid_db_id" TEXT /* ID of the lipid in an external database */,
  "lipid_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the lipid identification */,
  "lipid_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the lipid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lipid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library */,
  "library_type" TEXT /* Type of the library (e.g., HCD, Q-Exactive) */,
  "library_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the library */,
  "library_version" TEXT /* Version number of the library */,
  "library_source" TEXT /* Source of the library */,
  "library_license" TEXT /* License agreement for the library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lipid_library_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "lipid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lipid */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library */,
  "link_score" REAL /* Score of the link between the lipid and library */,
  "link_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lipid_library_links_lipid_id FOREIGN KEY ("lipid_id") REFERENCES lipids ("lipid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lipid_library_links_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectral_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "lipid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lipid */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., m/z, intensity) */,
  "component_value" REAL /* Value of the component */,
  "component_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the spectral component */,
  "component_type_other" TEXT /* Other type of spectral component */,
  "component_intensity_type" TEXT /* Type of intensity measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectral_components_lipid_id FOREIGN KEY ("lipid_id") REFERENCES lipids ("lipid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fragmentation_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pattern */,
  "lipid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lipid */,
  "fragment_mz" REAL /* m/z value of the fragment */,
  "fragment_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the fragment */,
  "pattern_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the fragmentation pattern */,
  "pattern_type" TEXT /* Type of fragmentation pattern */,
  "pattern_energy" REAL /* Energy level of the fragmentation pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fragmentation_patterns_lipid_id FOREIGN KEY ("lipid_id") REFERENCES lipids ("lipid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of the sample (e.g., plasma, tissue) */,
  "sample_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sample */,
  "sample_source" TEXT /* Source of the sample */,
  "sample_preparation" TEXT /* Preparation method of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lipid_sample_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "lipid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lipid */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample */,
  "link_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the lipid in the sample */,
  "link_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the lipid in the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lipid_sample_links_lipid_id FOREIGN KEY ("lipid_id") REFERENCES lipids ("lipid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lipid_sample_links_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "lipid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lipid */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the change */,
  "audit_old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "audit_new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_lipid_id FOREIGN KEY ("lipid_id") REFERENCES lipids ("lipid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "lipid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lipid */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_lipid_id FOREIGN KEY ("lipid_id") REFERENCES lipids ("lipid_id")
)
